member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.App
member.summary: MAUI Application class. Sets up the main shell and initial page when the app starts.

member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.ILocationService
member.summary: Interface for location tracking service. Abstracts the geolocation functionality for the application.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.ILocationService.GetCurrentLocationAsync
member.summary: Gets the current location of the device asynchronously.
member.returns: A Location object containing latitude and longitude, or null if unavailable.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.ILocationService.CheckAndRequestPermissionAsync
member.summary: Checks if geolocation permission is granted.
member.returns: True if permission is granted, false otherwise.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.ILocationService.IsLocationServiceEnabledAsync
member.summary: Checks if location services are enabled on the device.
member.returns: True if location services are enabled, false otherwise.

member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.INarrationService
member.summary: Interface for narration and geofence management service. Handles distance calculations, cooldown checks, and TTS playback.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.INarrationService.CalculateDistance(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the distance in meters between a user location and a POI using the Haversine formula.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.INarrationService.ShouldTriggerNarration(VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Checks if a POI should trigger narration based on: 1. User being within the geofence radius 2. Cooldown period not being active
member.returns: True if narration should be triggered, false otherwise.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.INarrationService.PlayNarrationAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Plays the narration text using Text-to-Speech.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.INarrationService.ResetPoiCooldown(System.Int32)
member.summary: Resets the cooldown for a specific POI (used for testing purposes).

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Interfaces.INarrationService.GetLastTriggeredTime(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the last triggered time for a POI, or null if never triggered.
member.returns: DateTime of last trigger, or null if never triggered.

member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.MauiProgram
member.summary: MAUI application configuration and dependency injection setup. Configures services, viewmodels, and pages for the application.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.MauiProgram.CreateMauiApp
member.summary:
Creates and configures the MAUI application with dependency injection.
Service Registration: 1. ILocationService -> LocationService (GPS tracking) 2. INarrationService -> NarrationService (Distance calc, TTS, cooldown) 3. LocationTrackingViewModel (Main ViewModel) 4. MainPage (UI)

member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.NarrationLogEntry
member.summary: Represents a log entry for a triggered narration event. Used to display narration history in the UI.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.NarrationLogEntry.PoiName
member.summary: Name of the POI that triggered the narration.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.NarrationLogEntry.TriggeredAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the narration was triggered.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.NarrationLogEntry.NarrationText
member.summary: The description text that was narrated.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.NarrationLogEntry.UserLocation
member.summary: User's location when narration was triggered.

member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel
member.summary: Represents a Point of Interest (POI) for the food tour. Contains location data and narration information for TTS playback.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the POI.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel.Name
member.summary: Name of the POI (e.g., "Ben Thanh Market").

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel.Latitude
member.summary: Latitude coordinate of the POI.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel.Longitude
member.summary: Longitude coordinate of the POI.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel.DescriptionText
member.summary: Description text to be narrated via TTS when user approaches the POI.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel.Radius
member.summary: Radius in meters. When user is within this distance, narration triggers.

member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.LocationService
member.summary: Implementation of ILocationService using MAUI's Geolocation API. Provides device location tracking with permission management.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.LocationService.GetCurrentLocationAsync
member.summary: Gets the current device location asynchronously.
member.returns: Location object with latitude/longitude, or null if unavailable.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.LocationService.CheckAndRequestPermissionAsync
member.summary: Ensures geolocation permission is granted before usage.
member.returns: True if permission is granted, false otherwise.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.LocationService.IsLocationServiceEnabledAsync
member.summary: Verifies that location services are enabled on the device.

member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService
member.summary: Implementation of INarrationService. Handles geofence detection, cooldown management, and TTS narration playback.

member.name: F:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService.COOLDOWN_DURATION_MINUTES
member.summary: Cooldown duration in minutes. Prevents repeated narration of the same POI.

member.name: F:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService._poiLastTriggeredTimes
member.summary: Tracks the last triggered time for each POI (by ID). Prevents audio spam by enforcing cooldown period.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService.CalculateDistance(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary:
Calculates the distance between two geographic coordinates using the Haversine formula.
The Haversine formula calculates the great-circle distance between two points on a sphere given their latitudes and longitudes.
Formula: a = sin²(Δφ/2) + cos φ1 ⋅ cos φ2 ⋅ sin²(Δλ/2) c = 2 ⋅ atan2( √a, √(1−a) ) d = R ⋅ c
where: - φ is latitude, λ is longitude, R is earth's radius (≈6371 km) - Δφ is the difference in latitude - Δλ is the difference in longitude

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService.ShouldTriggerNarration(VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary:
Checks if a POI should trigger narration.
Conditions for triggering: 1. User must be within the POI's radius (geofence check) 2. POI must not be in cooldown period (last narration was more than 5 minutes ago)
member.returns: True if narration should trigger, false otherwise.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService.PlayNarrationAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Plays narration text using the MAUI TextToSpeech API.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService.MarkPoiAsTriggered(System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks a POI as triggered at the current time, starting its cooldown period. Called after narration is played to enforce cooldown.
member.param: The ID of the POI that was triggered.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService.ResetPoiCooldown(System.Int32)
member.summary: Resets the cooldown for a specific POI (useful for testing).

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService.GetLastTriggeredTime(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the last triggered date/time for a POI.
member.returns: DateTime of last trigger, or null if never triggered.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.Services.NarrationService.DegreesToRadians(System.Double)
member.summary: Converts degrees to radians for trigonometric calculations.

member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel
member.summary:
ViewModel for location tracking and POI narration. Implements MVVM pattern with INotifyPropertyChanged for data binding.
Responsibilities: 1. Manage location tracking timer 2. Periodically request user location (every 5 seconds) 3. Check each POI for geofence entry 4. Trigger narration if conditions are met 5. Maintain narration log for UI display

member.name: F:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel.LOCATION_UPDATE_INTERVAL_MS
member.summary: Location tracking interval in milliseconds. Request location every 5 seconds for PoC.

member.name: P:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel.NarrationLog
member.summary: Observable collection of narration log entries displayed in the UI.

member.name: F:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel._pointsOfInterest
member.summary: Mock list of Points of Interest in Ho Chi Minh City.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel.InitializeMockPois
member.summary: Initialize mock POIs in Ho Chi Minh City (District 4 area). In a real app, these would be loaded from a database or API.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel.StartTrackingAsync
member.summary: Starts the location tracking timer and background location updates. Called when user taps the "Start Tracking" button.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel.StopTracking
member.summary: Stops the location tracking timer and cancels any ongoing TTS playback. Called when user taps the "Stop Tracking" button.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel.UpdateLocationAndCheckPoisAsync
member.summary:
Called every 5 seconds by the location tracking timer.
Main workflow: 1. Fetch current device location 2. Update UI with current coordinates 3. Check each POI to see if user entered its geofence 4. Trigger narration for POIs that meet all conditions

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel.CheckAllPoisAsync(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Checks all POIs to determine which ones should trigger narration. For each POI that meets the trigger conditions: 1. Log the event 2. Mark POI as triggered (start cooldown) 3. Play TTS narration

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel.TriggerNarrationAsync(VinhKhanhFoodTour.Models.PoiModel,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Executes the complete narration workflow for a triggered POI.
member.param: User's current latitude at time of trigger.
User's current longitude at time of trigger.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.ViewModels.LocationTrackingViewModel.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a timestamped log message to the narration log. Used for diagnostic and information messages.

member.name: T:VinhKhanhFoodTour.MainPage
member.summary: Main page of the Vinh Khanh Food Tour application. Provides UI for location tracking and narration log display.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.MainPage.OnAppearing
member.summary: Called when the page is loaded. Initializes the ViewModel and sets up data binding.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.MainPage.OnStartTrackingClicked(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Event handler for the "Start Tracking" button. Initiates location tracking and POI monitoring.

member.name: M:VinhKhanhFoodTour.MainPage.OnStopTrackingClicked(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Event handler for the "Stop Tracking" button. Stops location tracking and cancels any ongoing TTS playback.
